title: The Bangladesh Laws (Amendment) Act, 1975
description: An Act to amend and repeal certain laws. WHEREAS it is expedient to amend and repeal certain laws for the purposes hereinafter appearing; It is hereby enacted as follows:-

provisions.title: 1. Short title
provisions.content:
1. (1) This Act may be called the Bangladesh Laws (Amendment) Act, 1975 .
(2) It shall be deemed to have taken effect on the 25th day of January, 1975.

provisions.title: 2. Amendment of E. P. Ordinance II of 1964
provisions.content: 2. In the Cadet College Ordinance, 1964 (E. P. Ordinance II of 1964), in section 4A, in clause (a), for the words and comma “Prime Minister, Government” the word “President” shall be substituted.

provisions.title: 3. Amendment of P. O. No. 49 of 1972
provisions.content:
3. In the Bangladesh Special (Remuneration and Privileges) Order, 1972 (P. O. No. 49 of 1972),-
(a) in the preamble, in the first paragraph, for the words “Ministers of the Cabinet” the words “Members of the Council of Ministers” shall be substituted; and
(b) in Article 2, for clause (b) the following shall be substituted, namely:-
“(b) “Minister” means a member of the Council of Ministers and includes a Minister of State and a Deputy Minister but does not include the Prime Minister;”.

provisions.title: 4. Amendment of P. O. No. 64 of 1972
provisions.content:
4. In the Bangladesh (Whips) Order, 1972 (P. O. No. 64 of 1972),-
(a) in Article 3, in clause (4), for the words “Prime Minister” the word “President” shall be substituted; and
(b) Article 6 shall be omitted.

provisions.title: 5. Amendment of P. O. No. 94 of 1972
provisions.content: 5. In the Bangladesh (Freedom Fighters) Welfare Trust Order, 1972 (P. O. No. 94 of 1972), in Article 7, in clause (1), in sub-clause (a), the words “nominated by the Prime Minister” shall be omitted.

provisions.title: 6. Amendment of P. O. No. 22 of 1973
provisions.content:
6. In the Bangladesh Local Government (Union Parishad and Paurashava) Order, 1973 (P. O. No. 22 of 1973), in the preamble,-
(a) the first paragraph shall be omitted; and
(b) in the second paragraph, the word “AND” shall be omitted.

provisions.title: 7. Amendment of Act XII of 1974
provisions.content: 7. In the Public Servants (Retirement) Act, 1974 (XII of 1974), in section 5, in sub-section (3), for the words “Prime Minister” the word “President” shall be substituted.

provisions.title: 8. Repeal of Act III of 1962, P. O. No. 8 of 1973 and Ord. No. XIII of 1975
provisions.content: 8. The Political Parties Act, 1962 (III of 1962), the Representation of the People (Supplementary) Order, 1973 (P. O. No. 8 of 1973), and the Bangladesh Laws (Amendment) Ordinance, 1975 (Ord. No. XIII of 1975), are hereby repealed.
